issues.description: SearchDeck action is oversimplified. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 4 cards, (2) filtering for {Cross Guild} type OR 'Baroque Works' type (excluding Mr.3), (3) revealing up to 1 card, (4) adding to hand, (5) placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL lacks the 4-card limit, proper filter conditions, 'up to 1' constraint, reveal step, and reordering mechanic.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify: HasType({Cross Guild}) OR (HasType('Baroque Works') AND NOT IsName('Mr.3(Galdino)'))

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Cross Guild} type card or card with a type including "Baroque Works" other than [Mr.3(Galdino)] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
